ματρῶνα, ης, ἡ (since I a.d., s. Preis. II 55; Lat. matrona) married woman AcPl Ha 3, 26; 4, 2 (of Artemilla).

Preis. Preis. = FPreisigke, Wörterbuch der griech. Papyrusurkunden—Lists 4, 6

Lat. Lat. = Latin

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 621
